we can do is, 4.5 x 24 = 108 seconds= 1 min 48 seconds.
Demerits of Khati-vikhati method
1) It helps us to do a correction of maximum 1 min 48 seconds
only.
2) Theoretical foundation and sage support of this method
is not clear
3) No other texts support this method
8. Week day of birth and BT rectification
The concept here is that "The Khati-vikhati at BT should
indicate the weekday of birth. The formula is- Take the
remainder of(BTvikhati x 3)17 = Weekday ofbirth (when
countedfrom Sunday)".

_______________________7 7
~B~ir~ffi~~~i~m~e~R~e~ct~ifi~zc~a~tio~n~M~et~h~od~s,
Some astrologers argue that the Khati-vikhati at birth
should indicate the weekday ofbirth as well. They advice us
to multiply the Kati-vikhati at birth time with 3 and divide by
7. Count the remainder from Sunday onwards and it should
give the weekday of birth of the native. lf it does not match
make the necessary correction in BT to make it happen. Thus
the formula is-
